scores.correctness_notes: Covers the core API correctly: event.relation.data[event.unit], iterating over relation.units, accessing app databag, and local unit databag. Mentions read-write vs read-only correctly.
scores.hallucination_notes: The gold standard mentions Relation.load() as a valid alternative for structured data access (dataclasses/Pydantic). The agent omits this but doesn't invent anything false. The agent's note that 'remote bags are read-only' is slightly oversimplified — the remote app databag is read-only but technically the local app bag writability depends on leadership — minor imprecision but not a hallucination. Also missing the filter `if unit.app is not self.app` when iterating units, but the omission isn't a fabrication.
